entities.name: SOCKS v4/v5 proxy server
entities.context: A type of proxy server that can handle connections for clients.

entities.name: TCP port
entities.context: A communication endpoint used for network connections.

entities.name: incoming connection
entities.context: A connection request from a remote client to the proxy server.

entities.name: full duplex stream
entities.context: A communication channel that allows simultaneous data transmission in both directions.

relationships.context: The proxy server listens on a new TCP port.
The proxy server sends a notification about incoming connections.
The TCP port is used to establish a full duplex stream.
